title: quercus rex
intro: Quercus rex is a deciduous tree native to the Himalayas, specifically defined as a variety of the Himalayan Oak (Quercus leucotrichophora). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Quercus rex include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Quercus rex can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
